title: career-ops.application.submitted v1
description: Emitted by career-ops when the user confirms an application has actually been submitted (post the mandatory human-review gate — career-ops never auto-submits). Marks the applications.md tracker row transitioning to the 'Applied' canonical state. Consumers use this for outreach cadence tracking and dashboarding.

company.description: Company name, matching the Company column in data/applications.md.

role_title.description: Role title, matching the Role column in data/applications.md.

score.description: Fit score out of 5 recorded at evaluation time.

status.description: Canonical applications.md state this event transitions the row into.

url.description: Posting URL that was applied to.

report.description: Relative path to the dossier/report file backing this application, e.g. reports/001-scalar-2026-06-26.md.
